name: French Passport Number
description: Detects French passport numbers. Format: 2 letters followed by 7 digits (ICAO biometric standard) or 8 digits (older series). Context-anchored to the keyword 'passport' or 'passeport' to avoid false positives from the short alphanumeric pattern.

metadata.pattern_source: Based on Presidio FrPassportRecognizer and ICAO Doc 9303
metadata.format: AA1234567 (2 letters + 7 digits, biometric) or AA12345678 (2 letters + 8 digits, older series)
metadata.note: Context prefix (passport/passeport) required to distinguish from other 9-char alphanumeric codes

effect.message: French passport number tokenized for de-identification
